text.headline: The Geographic Arc
text.text: An academic journey from China to California, through postdoctoral training to faculty positions in Georgia and Texas.

text.headline: Wuhan / Wuhan University
text.text: Gengchen Mai's undergraduate foundation in Geographic Information System at Wuhan University.

text.headline: Santa Barbara / UC Santa Barbara
text.text: Graduate studies at UCSB Geography, earning M.A. and Ph.D. with focus on GeoAI and spatial machine learning.

text.headline: Stanford / AI Lab
text.text: Postdoctoral research at Stanford Artificial Intelligence Laboratory.

text.headline: Athens / University of Georgia
text.text: First faculty position, building a GeoAI research program and earning the AAG Nystrom Award.

text.headline: Austin / UT Austin
text.text: Current position directing the SEAI Lab and advancing research in spatially explicit AI.
